exercises.title: Priority Scoring
exercises.description: Apply the priority scoring framework to sample systems.
tasks: Score a web API (external, customer data)

exercises.title: Decision Tree
exercises.description: Create a decision tree for priority assignment.

exercises.title: Migration Queue
exercises.description: Build a migration queue for a sample organization.
hints: Group into waves based on priority and dependencies

exercises.title: Dependency Mapping
exercises.description: Map dependencies that affect migration sequence.
hints: PKI before certs, HSMs before key management
